_comment: Reasonix 1.2.0+ fires UserPromptSubmit, PreToolUse, PostToolUse, and Stop. UserPromptSubmit → working (turn starts). PreToolUse match:write-tools → blocked. PostToolUse (always) → working (unsticks blocked→working after tool runs). Stop → idle (turn over). Shell wrapper sends release on exit.

UserPromptSubmit.description: herdr: report working when user submits a prompt

PreToolUse.description: herdr: report blocked when file-writer tool is called

PostToolUse.description: herdr: restore working after each tool call (transitions blocked→working)

Stop.description: herdr: report idle when turn ends
